engagement_strategy: Reward loyalty with exclusive offers and early access to new products. Assign dedicated account manager. Invite to advisory board.
Upsell higher-value products. Offer loyalty program benefits. Regular business reviews and relationship building.
Nurture with personalized recommendations. Provide onboarding support. Offer volume discount incentives.
Welcome program with dedicated onboarding. Educate on full product portfolio. Quick-win case studies.
Engage with targeted content. Offer trial of premium products. Build relationship through regular touchpoints.
Proactive outreach to understand needs. Offer special promotions. Schedule quarterly business reviews.
Urgent re-engagement campaign. Executive-level outreach. Competitive win-back offers and service recovery.
Reactivation campaign with compelling offers. Survey to understand disengagement reasons. Time-limited incentives.
Win-back email series. Share new product announcements. Offer significant re-engagement discounts.
Low-cost re-engagement attempts. Annual check-in. Archive if no response after 2 attempts.
